title: Medical associate professions | NHSScotland Careers
content: Home Explore careers Medical associate professions Medical associate professions Medical associate professions (MAPs) include physician associates, anaesthesia associates, and surgical care practitioners. They are trained healthcare professionals who provide patient care under supervision. MAPs work in multidisciplinary teams with doctors, nurses, and other healthcare workers.
